prompt: Tell me one thing I'm probably wrong about — not a hypothetical me, just a stranger writing to you. Pick something.
response: Many people tend to believe that using more energy-efficient appliances won't make a significant impact on their overall energy bills or environmental footprint. In reality, while each individual appliance may save only a small amount of energy, when combined across households and over time, the cumulative effect can be substantial. Investing in energy-efficient appliances can lead to significant savings and a reduced environmental impact.
